title: HutierTagger
description: Displays Hutier tier tags above player names
body:
# HutierTagger

**HutierTagger** is a client-side Fabric mod that shows **Hutier tier tags above player names**.

It adds a **gamemode icon**, the player's **tier rank**, and the correct **tier color** directly to the nametag, so you can recognize Hutier ranks in-game without checking the website manually.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vzxRWxQcHE8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Features

- Shows Hutier tiers above player names
- Displays a gamemode icon before the rank
- Lets you choose which gamemode tier is shown
- Can be turned on or off at any time
- Includes an in-game config screen through **Mod Menu**
- Uses async requests and local caching to stay lightweight

## How It Works

The mod fetches public tier data from the **Hutier API** and renders the selected result on your client.

If a player does not have a rank for the currently selected gamemode, no tier tag is shown for that player.

> This is a **client-side visual mod**.  
> It does **not** require a server plugin and only changes what **you** see.

## Compatibility

- Minecraft: `1.21.11`
- Mod Loader: Fabric
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu): Optional, but recommended
